_comment: Bundled fallback registry index for the Synapse marketplace (ADR-0001). Used by GET /api/v1/marketplace when no SYNAPSE_TOOL_REGISTRY_URL env var is set. The real first-party index will live at https://synapse.whatif.dev/tools/index.json once the marketplace ships.

tools.name: Cloudtap
tools.description: Multi-tunnel Cloudflare quick tunnels. Auto-labels by registered project port.

tools.name: Open Synapse docs
tools.description: Opens the Synapse documentation in your default browser. A 12-line manifest — nothing else.

manifest_inline.name: Open Synapse docs
manifest_inline.description: One-tap link to the Synapse README on GitHub.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Run Claude Code as a Synapse session tab. Uses your existing Claude CLI credentials -- no new sign-in. Requires `claude` on PATH.

manifest_inline.name: Claude Code
manifest_inline.description: Live Claude Code session under a real PTY. Output streams into a Sessions tab; type to interact.

tools.name: OpenAI Codex CLI
tools.description: Run OpenAI's Codex CLI as a Synapse session tab. Inherits your Codex login. Requires `codex` on PATH.

manifest_inline.name: OpenAI Codex CLI
manifest_inline.description: Live Codex CLI session under a real PTY.

tools.name: Git status
tools.description: Runs `git status --short` in a folder you pick and shows the output. Demonstrates the process.spawn primitive.
